summary: All four sections are present in order with correct EDS signature classes (eds-hero-banner, eds-card, eds-footer) and accurate text, but the hero title font-size/weight are wrong and the content-block-1 layout is badly broken (image placed full-width below text instead of as a right-side column at 548x391). Several typography and color details diverge from spec, consistent with the 76.4% pixel match.

issues.fix: Set .hero-title font-size to 33px and font-weight to 400

issues.expected: Two-column row: text left, image right sized 548x391 at x≈699
issues.actual: Image renders full-width (1160x829) stacked below text/button
issues.fix: Constrain the image column to 548x391 and ensure the lg-6 columns sit side-by-side; do not let image expand full-bleed
Set .footer-inline-link/.footer-unity-link span color to #404040 and weight 400

issues.actual: 'Transformative' is black bold; only 'Therapies' is orange
issues.fix: Apply the orange/primary color to both 'Transformative' and 'Therapies' spans
Render the divider at 0x28px in the nav-right separator at correct position

issues.expected: weight per design (~h tokens 600) and correct scale
issues.fix: Align heading font-size/weight to design heading tokens

issues.expected: Pipeline, News, Stories@Gilead, Investors, Find a Trial, Search for Jobs (per spec list)
issues.actual: Investors, Find a Trial, Pipeline, Search for Jobs, News, Stories@Gilead
issues.fix: Match the design's visible Quick Links order
Adjust footer column padding/gaps to align icons
Rotate arrow icons to point upward-right per design

layoutFailures.fix: Set font-size to 33px (use the matching token/heading class)
Shift horizontally to x≈1176px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈699px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈434px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈533px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈545px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈573px (check column/alignment classes)
